mapper.sql:
SELECT VEHICLE.VEHICLEKEY ,VEHICLE.VEHICLENUM ,VEHICLE.CTKEY ,(SELECT CTNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CT WHERE CTKEY = VEHICLE.CTKEY) CTNAME ,VEHICLE.LOGGRPCD ,(SELECT CTCD_DTNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT WHERE CTCD_HDKEY = 'LOGGRPCD' AND CTCD_DTKEY = VEHICLE.LOGGRPCD AND CTKEY = VEHICLE.CTKEY) LOGGRPCDNAME ,VEHICLE.DCKEY ,(SELECT CTCD_DTNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT WHERE CTCD_HDKEY = 'DCKEY' AND CTCD_DTKEY = VEHICLE.DCKEY AND CTKEY = VEHICLE.CTKEY) DCNAME ,VEHICLE.CARRKEY ,(SELECT CARRNM FROM TT_CARR_T WHERE CARRCD = VEHICLE.CARRKEY) CARRNAME ,VEHICLE.VEHICLETYP ,(SELECT CTCD_DTNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT WHERE CTCD_HDKEY = 'EQUIPTYPCD' AND CTCD_DTKEY = VEHICLE.VEHICLETYP AND CTKEY = VEHICLE.CTKEY) VEHICLETYPNAME ,VEHICLE.ICGRKEY ,(SELECT CTCD_DTNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT WHERE CTCD_HDKEY = 'ICGRKEY' AND CTCD_DTKEY = VEHICLE.ICGRKEY AND CTKEY = VEHICLE.CTKEY) ICGRNAME ,VEHICLE.LENGTHS ,VEHICLE.WIDTH ,VEHICLE.HEIGHT ,VEHICLE.USABLLEN ,VEHICLE.USABLWDTH ,VEHICLE.USABLHGHT ,VEHICLE.MAXLDWGT ,VEHICLE.MAXLDVOL ,VEHICLE.VEHICLENETWGT ,VEHICLE.VEHICLEOPT ,VEHICLE.REGULATYP ,CASE VEHICLE.REGULATYP WHEN 'Y' THEN '정규' WHEN 'N' THEN '예비' END REGULATYPNAME ,VEHICLE.INSERTDATE ,VEHICLE.INSERTURKEY ,VEHICLE.INSERTURKEY AS INSERTURNAME ,VEHICLE.UPDATEDATE ,VEHICLE.UPDATEURKEY ,VEHICLE.UPDATEURKEY AS UPDATEURNAME ,VEHICLE.DELYN FROM TEST_VEHICLEMASTER VEHICLE WHERE 1=1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
SELECT DISTINCT CARRCD ,CARRNM FROM TT_CARR_T WHERE 1=1
